---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the CLI
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
A clear, concise description of the problem this feature would solve. Tell us about the use case.

**What's your proposed solution?**
The CLI behavior, command, or option you'd like.

**Alternatives you've considered**
Other ways to solve this problem (workarounds, other tools, etc.).

**Notes**
Anything else relevant. Please do not request features that would require disclosing the proprietary compression methods (those are patent-pending and not in scope of this open-source CLI).
